description: Business letter to Mevorakh b. Avraham Ibn Sabra. In Judaeo-Arabic. In the margins of verso (the first page), there is a price list for commodities including pepper, sal ammoniac (nushādir), galingale, spikenard, camphor, Egyptian sugar, and mastic. On recto (the second page) mentions people such as Abū Yiṣḥaq Avraham b. Yaʿaqov; Abū l-Faraj; Barhūn Ibn al-Ḥaṣīra; al-Ḥusayn b. Wuhayb. Needs further examination.
